concepts.label: Kuiper Belt

concepts.label: Oort Cloud

concepts.label: Dwarf Planet

concepts.label: Terrestrial Planet

concepts.label: Gas Giant
concepts.definition: Large planet composed mainly of hydrogen and helium

concepts.label: Ice Giant
concepts.definition: Giant planet composed mainly of heavier elements like oxygen, carbon, nitrogen

concepts.label: Orbital Period
concepts.definition: Time taken for a celestial object to complete one orbit

concepts.label: Astronomical Unit
concepts.definition: Unit of length equal to the average Earth-Sun distance, about 150 million km

concepts.label: Light-Year
concepts.definition: Distance light travels in one year, approximately 9.46 trillion km

concepts.label: Parsec
concepts.definition: Unit of distance equal to about 3.26 light-years

concepts.label: Main Sequence

concepts.label: Red Giant

concepts.label: White Dwarf

concepts.label: Neutron Star

concepts.label: Pulsar

concepts.label: Black Hole

concepts.label: Supernova

concepts.label: Protostar

concepts.label: Nebula

concepts.label: Planetary Nebula

concepts.label: Binary Star

concepts.label: Hertzsprung-Russell Diagram
concepts.definition: Scatter plot of stars showing luminosity versus temperature

concepts.label: Stellar Nucleosynthesis
concepts.definition: Creation of chemical elements through nuclear reactions within stars

concepts.label: Nuclear Fusion
concepts.definition: Process where atomic nuclei combine to form heavier nuclei, releasing energy

concepts.label: Chandrasekhar Limit

concepts.label: Event Horizon

concepts.label: Schwarzschild Radius

concepts.label: Hawking Radiation
concepts.definition: Theoretical radiation emitted by black holes due to quantum effects

concepts.label: Supermassive Black Hole

concepts.label: Accretion Disk
concepts.definition: Structure formed by diffuse material orbiting a massive central body

concepts.label: Quasar

concepts.label: Magnetar

concepts.label: Brown Dwarf

concepts.label: Spectral Classification

concepts.label: Luminosity

concepts.label: Apparent Magnitude

concepts.label: Absolute Magnitude

concepts.label: Milky Way

concepts.label: Andromeda Galaxy

concepts.label: Spiral Galaxy

concepts.label: Irregular Galaxy

concepts.label: Dark Energy

concepts.label: Cosmic Microwave Background

concepts.label: Redshift

concepts.label: Cosmic Inflation

concepts.label: Multiverse

concepts.label: String Theory

concepts.label: Special Relativity
concepts.definition: Einstein's theory about the relationship between space and time

concepts.label: Spacetime

concepts.label: Astrophysics

concepts.label: ESA

concepts.label: SpaceX

concepts.label: International Space Station

concepts.label: Mars Rover
